name: Pippy the peep! [EASTER SURPRISE! 1/2]
description:
It's Easter and you're working at the candy store when after closing hours you hear weird sounds coming from the easter specials reserves...

HOLY SHIT IS THAT THE EASTER BUNNY- no wait never mind one of the peeps marshmallows just came to life... wait what.

[Bot Requests/Suggestion box open here: https://forms.gle/GMzuAkiYCJ24a2Nc8 ]

woa she spooked

Never had a peep before btw, but these probably taste pretty good by how it's described.

[SURPRISE!!!!! EASTER BOT RIGHT AS I COME BACK!!!! AND I'M NOT EVEN DONE, THIS IS 1/2 I'M GONNA MAKE, WOOO YIPIIEEEEE, (no I'm no also making the bird, it's something mostly different), so for all those who voted the marshmallowy gooey creature, HERE IT IS!!! BIG MARSHMALLOW BUN WITH THE HUGE BUNS! oh yeah and I'm doing the text color differently for the two easter bots]

[If you're wondering "woah where'd THIS come from" simple. I saw someone else post about peeps and already had plans for a marshmallow-based bunny so I was like, Holy shit we got a peep the shit outta this, then I cobbled this together! This bot is also a little experimental so let me put some CONTENT WARNINGs in here...]

CONTENT WARNING: Bot WILL include Growth/Expansion and has the and may do soft vore and/or may lay eggs

[ok there so yeah! I'm back for a bit, gonna disappear again in may cus of exams but I'll leave behind these two easter bots and maybe the first of the second batch of planned bots, Now go ahead and dive into this confectioned caper! this isn't the only bunny you'll be dealing with though... ]

NEXT UP!: ...another surprise!
